page_metadata.biotools__summary: GIANA is for fast alignment of up to 10^7 TCR hypervariable CDR3 sequences. GIANA applies a mathematical framework to perform isometric encoding of amino acid sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GIANA is for fast alignment of up to 10^7 TCR hypervariable CDR3 sequences. GIANA applies a mathematical framework to perform isometric encoding of amino acid sequences.
